recommendations.title: The Hidden Face
recommendations.overview: A Spanish orchestra conductor deals with the mysterious disappearance of his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: The Nines
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

recommendations.title: Shutter Island
recommendations.overview: World War II soldier-turned-U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, but his efforts are compromised by troubling visions and a mysterious doctor.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: I'll Follow You Down
recommendations.overview: After the disappearance of a young scientist on a business trip, his son and wife struggle to cope, only to make a bizarre discovery years later - one that may bring him home.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: Detective Byomkesh Bakshy!
recommendations.overview: Byomkesh, fresh out of college, agrees to investigate the disappearance of Bhuvan, a chemist. Assisted by Bhuvan's son Ajit, Byomkesh links the case to a larger conspiracy that will unsettle Calcutta.

recommendations.title: Elephant Song
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist is drawn into a complex mind game when he questions a disturbed patient about the disappearance of a colleague.

recommendations.title: Gone Girl
recommendations.overview: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.

recommendations.title: Stolen
recommendations.overview: A detective becomes obsessed with solving a child's 50-year-old murder, uncovering striking similarities between the case and his son's disappearance.
